text:
Get set for another rich menu of athletics showdowns in 2024. Opportunities for medal hauls have been lined up in an activity-packed year.In 2023, the country's athletics stars fought off strong challenges from their global counterparts as they extended their dominance at the World Championships in Budapest and during the Bathurst World Cross Country bonanza among other international races.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Paris Olympics tops the list of global meets for Kenyan athletes
author: Stephen Rutto
description: It is a rich menu of athletics events in 2024 starting with World Cross in March.
